## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs

## Scope Check

- [ ] This change belongs to Engram GUI client scope.
- [ ] If server/runtime changes are needed, they are tracked in upstream Engram.

## Testing

- [ ] npm run typecheck
- [ ] npm run test
- [ ] cargo test (if src-tauri was touched)

## UI Impact

- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] UI changed and screenshots are attached

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I kept the PR focused and small
- [ ] I verified no sensitive data is exposed

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything specific reviewers should focus on.
